last_review_summary: Round 2: Core quantized verification loop in generate() now fully operational — QuantizedKVCache round-trip compresses target KV after each speculative round. measure_tv_distance() implements real empirical TV comparison via prefix/suffix split. Test suite covers Hadamard rotation roundtrip, ScalarQuantizer fidelity, QuantizedKVCache compression ratio, GQA attention, and end-to-end error bounds. Pipeline script (run_all_experiments.sh) orchestrates all 7 phases. Minor: consider adding integration test with small mock model.
